timeline.name: Ancient Awakening
timeline.description: The first energies of PersiaNexus awakened and changed the destiny of worlds.

timeline.name: Rise of Legends
timeline.description: Heroes like Rostam and Arash returned to protect the balance.

timeline.name: Shadow Era
timeline.description: Dark forces appeared and challenged the legendary heroes.

timeline.name: Future Nexus
timeline.description: Ancient power merges with advanced technology.
